headline: Global Industrial Gases Market Forecast to 2036 with Profiles of Active Manufacturers & Service Providers
summary: The "Industrial Gases Market by Type, Supply Mode, End-use Industry, and Geography - Global Forecast to 2036" report reveals the market is projected to hit USD 193.72 billion by 2036, up from USD 122.01 billion in 2026, growing at a CAGR of 4.7%. Key factors driving growth include industrial decarbonization, healthcare, and electronics manufacturing expansion. The report delves into major trends, segmentation, and provides analysis focused on oxygen, nitrogen, and hydrogen gases. Regionally, Asi
